# CWE-89 positive: taint-tracked SQL injection (identifier flow)
lang: go
file: CWE-89-taint-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func LookupUser(db *sql.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	_ = db.Query(name)
}
